description_long: This is an antique-style wooden table with a rectangular top that appears weathered and aged, featuring a dark, distressed finish with visible grain and wear marks. The table stands on four elegantly curved cabriole legs, each leg tapering gracefully and ending in a slight outward curve. The apron and legs are painted in a faded blue-green color, with some areas showing signs of chipping and patina, suggesting prolonged outdoor or garage use. The tabletop is thick and slightly raised above the apron, with a beveled edge and a visibly uneven surface, possibly due to years of use. One side of the table displays a vertical tricolor panel in green, white, and tan, which may be a remnant of paint or a decorative accent. The overall construction suggests solid wood, and the table exudes a rustic, vintage charm suitable for urban outdoor or semi-sheltered environments.
description: A vintage wooden table with a distressed dark top, curved cabriole legs, and faded blue-green paint, showing signs of age and outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, curved legs, and the weathered, dark wood surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped tabletop edge and the faded blue-green paint on the apron and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the table, the thick tabletop, and the continuous apron.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a tricolor vertical panel (green, white, tan) and the sloped tabletop edge.
